title: The Burger Company
summary: A vibrant, modern web experience for The Burger Company — an American kitchen serving premium burgers, crispy sides, and classic shakes with a fresh twist.
description: uilt for The Burger Company, this sleek digital platform showcases their mouth-watering menu, signature burgers, and warm American kitchen vibe. The site features an intuitive online ordering system, stunning food photography, location finder, and seamless user experience designed to drive foot traffic and online orders. Perfect blend of bold design and high-performance functionality.

title: Iron Throne Fitness
summary: Forge your legacy at Iron Throne Fitness. Strength starts here.
description: A commanding digital presence for Iron Throne Fitness — designed for powerlifters, strength athletes, and those who train like kings. The site highlights elite training programs, 24/7 access, premium equipment, and a no-excuses community ready to dominate.

title: Lumen & Form
summary: Where clarity meets intention. Lumen & Form — a branding studio crafting timeless visual identities.
description: The official digital home of Lumen & Form, a boutique branding studio. This beautifully designed website highlights their approach to visual identity, showcases client work, and invites businesses and creatives to collaborate on meaningful brand experiences.

title: Noor Al Massi
summary: An elegant e-commerce experience for Noor Al Massi — a luxury jewelry brand celebrating brilliance, timeless design, and the radiant beauty of fine craftsmanship.
description: Noor Al Massi’s digital boutique offers a refined shopping journey for exquisite fine jewelry. The website showcases stunning collections with high-quality imagery, detailed product views, and a seamless purchasing experience. Designed to reflect the brand’s essence of light, elegance, and sophistication, it helps customers discover and own pieces that celebrate life’s most precious moments.

title: Onyx Motors
summary: A bold digital experience for Onyx Motors — a premium electric luxury brand crafting vehicles that combine power, prestige, and cinematic presence.
description: Onyx Motors’ website presents a striking showcase of its elite electric vehicle lineup, including the Veloce, Phantom, Eclipse, Shadow, and Apex. The platform highlights the brand’s signature dark, powerful aesthetic with immersive visuals, detailed model information, digital features, and white-glove services. Built to attract discerning buyers who value innovation, performance, and unmistakable presence.
